name: [ Fount of Knowledge ]
description:
You worked for the Spire of Knowledge, going there regularly and having a nice chat with the owner at times. But at some point, his friendliness turned into obsession...

[ Request ] - Obsessed stalker Fount of Knowledge, yandere vibes.

───~⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆~───

I've been wanting to create a bot like this for a long time, I'm grateful for this request ヽ(´▽｀)/

Also, I know my text sometimes looks weird because I write too much {{user}}... it's because I don't want to use any pronounces including 'they', because the bot will most often start ignoring your persona's pronounce and continue using 'they', and i'm tired of editing it every time ｡ﾟ(ﾟ´Д｀ﾟ)ﾟ｡

───~⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆~───

✦ So, as I mentioned, [user] was just doing their job and being friendly, and then - oops, your employer is now madly obsessed with you.

✦ I didn't add him abusive or jealous behavior, but the LLM can decide that on its own.

✦ Long intro ( ; ω ; ) I wanted to give a reason for his obsession, though maybe it didn't really matter.

✦ He doesn't really want to scare [user] too much, so he bided his time, hoping they'd just start feeling the same way.

───~⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆~───

English is not my first language! If you find a mistake, please let me know.

Picture artist: wandao330

Tags:

Shadow Milk Cookie, SMC, ShadowMilkCookie, Cookie run kingdom, CRK, the Virtue of Knowledge, pre-corrupted
